## Environment

- blamejs version: `v0.X.Y` (or main `<sha>`)
- Node.js version: `node --version`
- OS: `uname -a` or Windows version
- Vault mode (if relevant): `plaintext` / `wrapped`
- DB mode (if relevant): `plain` / `encrypted`
